projects.title: Connectify
projects.category: Web Development /  Real Time Video Conferencing Platform   •  2024  •  Independent Developer
projects.description: Connectify – Real Time Video Conferencing Platform        • Developed a real-time video conferencing platform using React.js and Node.js with virtual meeting rooms. •  Integrated WebRTC and Socket.io for live video/audio communication and real-time chat. •  Implemented secure authentication and meeting history management using MongoDB.

projects.title: Wanderlust
projects.category: Full Stack /  Travel Listing Platform  •  2025  •  Independent Developer
projects.description: • Developed a full-stack travel listing platform using Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and EJS following MVC architecture. • Implemented authentication and authorization using Passport.js with session management. • Built CRUD functionality for listings and reviews with Joi validation and responsive UI.

projects.title: Mess & Canteen Management System
projects.category: Full Stack / Management System  •  2025  •  Collaborative Project
projects.description: A full-stack web application for managing mess/canteen operations including student billing, attendance tracking, staff management, and expense tracking.
